summary: Original ask, URL to exhaustive design.md tool
Decomposed into extractor (codex-1) and design.md writer (codex-2), CLI named designdna
Instructed codex-1 to build Playwright extraction engine emitting capture.json plus schema doc
Extractor built, 4/4 unit tests pass, Shopify acceptance unverified due to sandbox Chromium block
Acceptance run found 0 keyframes captured despite 40 named animations in use, and 220 item section list instead of top level outline
Fix CSS parser resilience so all keyframes are captured, and make section outline top level (8 to 25 entries)
Rewrote CSS parser token aware, top level outline logic, 5/5 tests pass, awaiting supervisor acceptance run
Shopify acceptance passes (14 keyframes, 0 unmatched, 17 sections) but example.com outline regressed to 0 of 1 sections
Outline must fall back to best candidates instead of returning empty on simple pages
Added zero result gated outline fallback with unit test, 6/6 tests pass
Extractor accepted, both acceptance captures verified by supervisor
Instructed codex-2 to build deterministic DESIGN.md writer against capture schema, animations as flagship chapter
Report writer built, 10/10 tests pass, 2632 line demo DESIGN.md generated with all 14 keyframes verbatim
E2E run verified, DESIGN.md exhaustive and correct, but color evidence shows non visual selectors (head, meta, title) coming from the capture
Exclude non rendered elements (head, meta, title, script, style, link) from computed style inspection
Non rendered elements excluded from style inspection, 11/11 tests pass
Fix verified on fresh Shopify capture, no non visual selectors in color evidence
designdna complete, URL in, exhaustive agent readable DESIGN.md out, verified on the Shopify example
